title: DIY Copper plating kit to make a "Harry-Potter" style wand
description:
Instructional video on using the new kit - Make and copper plate a magic wand. 
Our conductive ink can be used for EMF shielding, antennas and painted circuits.
Purchase the kit at: http://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-kits/make-and-copper-plate-a-magic-wand-kit/
If you've got any questions then email mandy@fwgltd.co.uk
